scripts.supabase:deploy-functions: supabase functions deploy generate-invoice-pdf && supabase functions deploy send-invoice
scripts.supabase:db:push:staging: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase link --project-ref $SUPABASE_STAGING_REF && supabase db push'
scripts.supabase:db:push:prod: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase link --project-ref $SUPABASE_PROD_REF && supabase db push'
scripts.supabase:db:push:prod:dry: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase link --project-ref $SUPABASE_PROD_REF && supabase db push --dry-run'
scripts.supabase:deploy-functions:staging: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase functions deploy generate-invoice-pdf --project-ref $SUPABASE_STAGING_REF && supabase functions deploy send-invoice --project-ref $SUPABASE_STAGING_REF'
scripts.supabase:deploy-functions:prod: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase functions deploy generate-invoice-pdf --project-ref $SUPABASE_PROD_REF && supabase functions deploy send-invoice --project-ref $SUPABASE_PROD_REF'
scripts.supabase:ship:staging: npm run check && npm run supabase:db:reset && npm run supabase:db:push:staging && npm run supabase:deploy-functions:staging
scripts.supabase:ship:prod: npm run check && npm run supabase:db:push:prod:dry && echo '\nDry run OK. Review above, then run: npm run supabase:ship:prod:apply'
scripts.supabase:ship:prod:apply: npm run check && npm run supabase:db:push:prod && npm run supabase:deploy-functions:prod
